addPage.descriptionPage: Enter the title of the new page
addPage.descriptionSection: Enter the title of the new section

delete.title: Delete {{item}}?
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this {{item}}? This action cannot be undone.
delete.modifiedWarning: This page was modified by another user.
delete.modifiedConfirm: The page has been refreshed. Please review and try again.
delete.modifiedConfirmDelete: The page has been refreshed. Do you still want to delete it?
delete.backlinksErrorPartial: Could not load page references. Deleting will still work, but link impact could not be shown.
delete.backlinksLoading: Checking which pages reference this page...
delete.backlinksCount_one: This page is referenced by {{count}} page.
delete.backlinksCount_other: This page is referenced by {{count}} pages.
delete.backlinksImpact: Deleting this page will leave those links broken.
delete.noBacklinks: No pages currently reference this page.

move.title: Move {{item}}
move.description: Select a new parent for this {{item}}

sort.title: Sort {{item}} Children
sort.description: Drag items to reorder, use the arrows, or sort alphabetically. Changes are saved after clicking 'Save'.

refactor.title: Update references?
refactor.description: This change affects the page path. Review the impacted pages before continuing.
refactor.rewriteLinksLabel: Update links on referencing pages automatically

unsaved.title: Unsaved Changes
unsaved.description: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave this page? Unsaved data will be lost.

quickSwitcher.title: Go to page
quickSwitcher.description: Search existing pages by title, path, or breadcrumb.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.createHint: Create the page by clicking the button below.

toast.slugGenerationFailed: Slug could not be generated. Please enter it manually.
toast.slugGenerating: Please wait until the slug is fully generated.

createByPath.existsWarning: A page already exists at this path.
